text: Iceberg lettuce sold at Taco Bell linked to cyclospora outbreak - CNN
fullText: Shredded iceberg lettuce supplied by Taylor Farms and sold at some Taco Bell restaurants has been linked to a multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis, a source familiar with the investigation said Thursday.
